name: Breeze Church Management API
what_it_does: Breeze REST API for church management software (ChMS). Enables AI agents to manage people and household records, track giving and pledges, manage event attendance, handle tags and custom fields for ministry tracking, access volunteer data, manage check-in workflows, generate giving reports, and integrate church data with communication and accounting systems.
use_cases: Managing congregation member profiles and household data from church administration agents
Retrieving giving history and pledge data from church stewardship agents
Tracking event attendance from ministry engagement agents
Syncing member data with email marketing platforms from church outreach agents
not_for: Large multi-site churches requiring enterprise ChMS capabilities
Non-religious organizations without church community management focus
Churches with complex multi-campus management without Breeze's scale
best_when: A small to mid-sized church using Breeze wants AI agents to automate congregation management, giving tracking, attendance reporting, and member communication workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Church membership and giving data is sensitive personal information. Religious affiliation data has heightened privacy protections. Giving information requires exceptional discretion.

auth.notes: Breeze uses API key authentication via X-Breeze-API-Key header. Church-level credentials with full data access. Simple API key model — no OAuth complexity. API access available on all paid plans.

pricing.paid_tiers: Flat $72/month per church regardless of size — very affordable for small churches
pricing.notes: Flat pricing model regardless of congregation size. Very popular with small and growing churches. Simple, user-friendly interface. API is REST-based with comprehensive documentation for a niche platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; avoid aggressive polling

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Religious membership and giving data requires heightened sensitivity and discretion
No public MCP server — REST API with API key header
No webhooks — requires polling for member and giving updates
No granular scopes — API key grants full church data access
Flat pricing makes this very affordable, but platform designed for small-church scale
agent_readiness.security_notes: Church membership and religious giving data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency. Small-church scale platform.

security_score_components.security_notes: Church membership and giving data. PCI-DSS. API key only, no scopes. US data residency. Simple auth model.
